styles.name: Amor Pixar
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a cute Pixar-style character deeply in love, with big sparkling eyes, rosy cheeks, and heart-shaped particles floating around them

styles.name: Príncipe/Princesa Disney
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a Disney prince or princess with elegant royal attire, magical sparkles, long flowing hair, and a fairytale castle background

styles.name: Personaje Minecraft
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a Minecraft character with blocky pixelated style, square head, cubic body, and the classic Minecraft world textures and colors

styles.name: Bruja Mágica
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a mystical witch with a pointed hat, magical glowing eyes, flowing dark robes, holding a magic wand with sparkling stars

styles.name: Superhéroe Marvel
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a Marvel superhero with a bold colorful costume, dynamic heroic pose, energy powers glowing from their hands, and a city skyline behind

styles.name: Anime Ghibli
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a Studio Ghibli anime character with soft watercolor style, expressive large eyes, gentle smile, surrounded by nature and floating spirits

styles.name: Cyborg Futurista
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a futuristic cyberpunk cyborg with glowing neon implants, metallic skin parts, LED eyes, and a neon-lit city background

styles.name: Villano de Película
styles.prompt: Transform the person in the photo into a dramatic movie villain with an elegant dark suit, sinister smile, dramatic lighting, and an ominous atmospheric background
